parameters.query: SELECT id, company_id, company_name, company_slug, url, url_type, page_type, enabled FROM core.tracked_pages WHERE enabled = true;

=INSERT INTO page_snapshots (tracked_page_id, week_start_date, fetched_at, status, http_status, text_content, content_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tracked_page_id }}',
  '{{ $json.week_start_date }}',
  now(),
  'success',
  {{ $json.http_status }},
  '{{ $json.text_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content_hash }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (tracked_page_id, week_start_date)
DO UPDATE SET fetched_at = now(), status = 'success', http_status = EXCLUDED.http_status, text_content = EXCLUDED.text_content, content_hash = EXCLUDED.content_hash
RETURNING id, tracked_page_id, week_start_date, content_hash, text_content;

=SELECT id, content_hash, week_start_date, text_content FROM page_snapshots
WHERE tracked_page_id = '{{ $json.tracked_page_id }}'
  AND week_start_date < '{{ typeof $json.week_start_date === "string" ? $json.week_start_date.slice(0, 10) : new Date($json.week_start_date).toISOString().slice(0, 10) }}'
ORDER BY week_start_date DESC
LIMIT 1;

=INSERT INTO page_diffs (tracked_page_id, week_start_date, old_snapshot_id, new_snapshot_id, old_hash, new_hash, diff_summary, change_magnitude)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tracked_page_id }}',
  '{{ typeof $json.week_start_date === "string" ? $json.week_start_date.slice(0, 10) : new Date($json.week_start_date).toISOString().slice(0, 10) }}',
  '{{ $json.old_snapshot_id }}',
  '{{ $json.new_snapshot_id }}',
  '{{ $json.old_hash }}',
  '{{ $json.new_hash }}',
  '{{ $json.diff_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.change_magnitude }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (tracked_page_id, week_start_date) DO UPDATE
SET old_snapshot_id = EXCLUDED.old_snapshot_id, new_snapshot_id = EXCLUDED.new_snapshot_id, old_hash = EXCLUDED.old_hash, new_hash = EXCLUDED.new_hash, diff_summary = EXCLUDED.diff_summary, change_magnitude = EXCLUDED.change_magnitude
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO classified_changes (page_diff_id, primary_tag, secondary_tags, rationale, implication, confidence)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Validate & Build Diff').first().json.primary_tag }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $('Validate & Build Diff').first().json.secondary_tags.map(t => "'" + t + "'").join(',') }}]::text[],
  '{{ ($('Validate & Build Diff').first().json.rationale || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($('Validate & Build Diff').first().json.implication || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $('Validate & Build Diff').first().json.confidence || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (page_diff_id) DO UPDATE
SET primary_tag = EXCLUDED.primary_tag, secondary_tags = EXCLUDED.secondary_tags, rationale = EXCLUDED.rationale, implication = EXCLUDED.implication, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence;

=INSERT INTO page_snapshots (tracked_page_id, week_start_date, fetched_at, status, http_status, text_content, content_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tracked_page_id }}',
  '{{ $json.week_start_date }}',
  now(),
  'failed',
  0,
  NULL,
  NULL
)
ON CONFLICT (tracked_page_id, week_start_date)
DO UPDATE SET fetched_at = now(), status = 'failed', http_status = 0
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO control_plane.signals (signal_type, severity, confidence, title, summary, evidence_urls, source_schema, source_table, source_id, meta)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.signal_type }}',
  {{ $json.severity }},
  {{ $json.confidence }},
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $json.evidence_urls.map(u => "'" + u.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}],
  '{{ $json.source_schema }}',
  '{{ $json.source_table }}',
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.meta).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (signal_type, source_schema, source_table, source_id) DO UPDATE
SET severity = EXCLUDED.severity, confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence, title = EXCLUDED.title, summary = EXCLUDED.summary, evidence_urls = EXCLUDED.evidence_urls, meta = EXCLUDED.meta;
